Title: Successful Login
Preconditions: User has a valid username and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Authenticate" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard.

Title: Incorrect Password
Preconditions: User has a valid username but an incorrect password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Enter "wrongpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Authenticate" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the password is incorrect.

Title: Empty Username
Preconditions: User leaves the username field empty.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the username field empty.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Authenticate" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the username cannot be empty.

Title: Empty Password
Preconditions: User leaves the password field empty.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Leave the password field empty.
3. Click on the "Authenticate" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the password cannot be empty.

Title: Successful Signup
Preconditions: User has a valid email and password.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "test@example.com" as the email.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The user is successfully registered and redirected to the login page.

Title: Duplicate Email
Preconditions: User attempts to register with an email already in use.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "test@example.com" as the email.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the email is already registered.

Title: Empty Email
Preconditions: User leaves the email field empty.
Test Steps:
1. Leave the email field empty.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the email cannot be empty.

Title: Empty Password
Preconditions: User leaves the password field empty.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "test@example.com" as the email.
2. Leave the password field empty.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the password cannot be empty.

Title: Successful Profile Update
Preconditions: User is logged in and has valid profile data.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter "John Doe" as the name.
3. Enter "30" as the age.
4. Click on the "UpdateProfile" button.
Expected Result: The user's profile is successfully updated and saved.

Title: Invalid Profile Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to enter invalid profile data.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter "John Doe" as the name.
3. Enter "thirty" as the age.
4. Click on the "UpdateProfile" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the age must be a number.

Title: Empty Profile Data
Preconditions: User is logged in and leaves the profile data fields empty.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Leave all profile data fields empty.
3. Click on the "UpdateProfile" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that at least one profile field must be filled.

Title: Successful Exit
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Exit" button.
2. Enter "Finished using the application" as the exit reason.
3. Confirm the exit.
Expected Result: The user's session is terminated, and they are logged out.

Title: Empty Exit Reason
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to exit without providing a reason.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Exit" button.
2. Leave the exit reason field empty.
3. Confirm the exit.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that an exit reason must be provided.

Title: Invalid Exit Reason
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to provide an invalid exit reason.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Exit" button.
2. Enter "Invalid reason" as the exit reason.
3. Confirm the exit.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the exit reason is invalid.

Title: Session Timeout
Preconditions: User is logged in and the session times out.
Test Steps:
1. Wait for the session to timeout.
2. Attempt to access a protected page.
Expected Result: The user is prompted to re-authenticate due to session timeout.

Title: Profile Update with Existing Username
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to update the username to an existing one.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter "existinguser" as the new username.
3. Click on the "UpdateProfile" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the username is already in use.

Title: Registration with Existing Email
Preconditions: User attempts to register with an email already in use.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "test@example.com" as the email.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Register" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the email is already registered.

Title: Multiple Failed Login Attempts
Preconditions: User enters incorrect credentials multiple times.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Enter "wrongpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Authenticate" button.
4. Repeat steps 1-3 two more times.
Expected Result: After three failed login attempts, the system locks the account temporarily.

Title: Profile Update with Invalid Email
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to update the email to an invalid format.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter "invalidemail" as the new email.
3. Click on the "UpdateProfile" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the email format is invalid.

Title: Exit with Invalid Reason
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to exit with an invalid reason.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Exit" button.
2. Enter "Invalid reason" as the exit reason.
3. Confirm the exit.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the exit reason is invalid.

Title: Login with Expired Account
Preconditions: User's account has expired.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Authenticate" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the account has expired.

Title: Profile Update with Missing Required Fields
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to update the profile with missing required fields.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter "John Doe" as the name.
3. Click on the "UpdateProfile" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that at least one required field is missing.

Title: Exit with Missing Reason
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to exit without providing a reason.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Exit" button.
2. Leave the exit reason field empty.
3. Confirm the exit.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that an exit reason must be provided.

Title: Login with Locked Account
Preconditions: User's account is locked after multiple failed login attempts.
Test Steps:
1. Enter "testuser" as the username.
2. Enter "testpassword" as the password.
3. Click on the "Authenticate" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the account is locked.

Title: Profile Update with Invalid Password
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to update the profile with an invalid password.
Test Steps:
1. Navigate to the profile page.
2. Enter "weakpassword" as the new password.
3. Click on the "UpdateProfile" button.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that the password is too weak.

Title: Exit with Empty Reason
Preconditions: User is logged in and attempts to exit with an empty reason.
Test Steps:
1. Click on the "Exit" button.
2. Leave the exit reason field empty.
3. Confirm the exit.
Expected Result: The system returns an error message indicating that an exit reason must be provided.

Title: Login with Expired Password
Preconditions: User's password has expired.
